summary: Tested EduPilot import system. Fixed critical bug in student import (gender mapping M/F to MALE/FEMALE). All import APIs (students, teachers, parents) working correctly via curl. UI wizard loads but has navigation timeout issues in Playwright due to slow page loads.

minor.issue: Returns 500 error intermittently - may be related to session/permissions

integration_issues.issue: Page navigation is slow (4-5s per request due to proxy.ts delays), causing Playwright timeouts

action_items: FIXED: Gender mapping bug in /app/src/app/api/import/students/route.ts - M/F now correctly maps to MALE/FEMALE
Consider optimizing proxy.ts rate limiting delays (currently 4.3s per request)
critical_code_review_comments: Gender enum mismatch between import schema (M/F) and Prisma schema (MALE/FEMALE) was causing all student imports to fail
Rate limiting in proxy.ts adds significant latency (~4.3s) to every authenticated request
seed_data_creation: Created test users via import API: test1.student@test.com, test2.student@test.com, prof1.teacher@test.com, prof2.teacher@test.com, parent1.family@test.com, parent2.family@test.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Import APIs are working. Login works but requires fresh browser session. Page loads are slow due to rate limiting. Use curl with cookies for faster API testing.
rca_of_the_issue: Student import was failing because the import schema accepts gender as 'M' or 'F' but Prisma expects 'MALE' or 'FEMALE'. Fixed by adding a mapping in the import route.
